description: Late list of names and amounts- probably list of debts in Venetian grossos. The paleography could be as early as a 15th-century when the Venetian grosso ceased production in 1462 CE. Some of the names mentioned are: Ḥanna, Aṣlān, and al-Qāvūqj[u]? (אל קאאוקג). The latter term may be an Arabophone spelling of the Turkish word kavukçu = "maker or seller of quilted turbans" (Redhouse Dictionary, p. 622). MCD.
tags: Turkish words, turban, Late JA, 15th or 16th c
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
